notes: No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (only present on chunk_001).
Event 0001104659-23-068068 (8-K 2023-06-05, Item 5.07 shareholder vote) skipped: header-only content (187 chars), no driver-relevant text.
10-Q event is part 2/2 (liquidity/capital MD&A + Risk Factors cross-reference stub); names coined only from visible part.

Skipped as vague/non-causal or redundant: adverse weather conditions (boilerplate, too vague), market instability, consumer spending (covered by consumer_confidence/consumer_dining_demand), benefit costs (covered by labor_costs/minimum_wage), operating cash flow (only a listed buyback factor), total liquidity/cash balance (covered by revolving_credit_facility_availability), bakery division description (about-us text, not causal), international licensing openings (covered by restaurant_development_guidance), Risk Factors item (pure cross-reference to 10-K).

Used acquisition_contingent_consideration (not frc_*) since Fox Restaurant Concepts is an acquired company's legal name; brand-level same_store_sales for the Cheesecake Factory flagship avoided because the brand equals the company legal name (banned); North Italia kept as brand-level driver per ontology R9.
revenue_surprise/eps_surprise follow the {metric}_surprise earnings convention for headline reported results in the earnings 8-K; no explicit consensus figures appear in the text.
